name: ENSLAVED SPIRIT

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (+) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

actions.name: Lethal Curse
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, the target gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Guided by Guilt
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove an Adversary or Spiritual Chains token from the target. The target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

extraction_notes: STN: 6 appears below the artwork - this may be a stat or reference number not defined in the schema
Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
The characteristics line shows 'Minion (3) ◆ Urami' - Urami appears after the diamond so it is a keyword
